recommendations.title: Hello Mary Lou: Prom Night II
recommendations.overview: When Hamilton High’s Prom Queen of 1957, Mary Lou Maloney is killed by her jilted boyfriend, she comes back for revenge thirty years later.

recommendations.title: Making Squid Game: The Challenge
recommendations.overview: Go behind the scenes and witness how the "Squid Game"-inspired reality show transformed from a scripted drama to a cutthroat, nail-biting competition.

recommendations.title: Prom Night
recommendations.overview: Donna's senior prom is supposed to be the best night of her life, though a sadistic killer from her past has different plans for her and her friends.

recommendations.title: Prom Night
recommendations.overview: At a high school senior prom, a masked killer stalks four teenagers who were responsible for the accidental death of a classmate six years prior.

recommendations.title: Senior Year
recommendations.overview: A 37-year-old woman wakes up from a 22-year coma, and returns to the high school where she was once a popular cheerleader to finish her senior year and become prom queen.

recommendations.title: Unrest
recommendations.overview: A young pathology med student suspects that the spirit of a dead cadaver in the hospital morgue where she works is killing off all those who handle or desecrate the body.

recommendations.title: Urban Legends: Bloody Mary
recommendations.overview: On a prom-night dare, a trio of high school friends chant an incantation, unleashing an evil spirit from the past with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: And Then There Were None
recommendations.overview: Ten people are invited to a hotel in the Iranian desert, only to find that an unseen person is killing them one by one. Could one of them be the killer?

recommendations.title: The Loved Ones
recommendations.overview: When Brent turns down his classmate Lola's invitation to the prom, she concocts a wildly violent plan for revenge.

recommendations.title: The Red Queen Kills Seven Times
